(** * AbelianPreCat is CategoryWithAdditiveStructure *)
(** ** Contents
- AbelianPreCat is CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
 - Preliminaries
 - AbelianPreCat is CategoryWithAdditiveStructure
*)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Equalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Kernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Cokernels.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pushouts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinDirectSums.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "- _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ - _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Additive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Abelian.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * AbelianPreCat is CategoryWithAdditiveStructure. *)
Section abelian_is_additive.

  Variable A : AbelianPreCat.
  Let hs : has_homsets A := homset_property A.

  (** ** Preliminaries *)

  (** Some maps we are going to use. *)
  Definition DiagonalMap {X : A} (BinProd : BinProduct A X X) :
    A⟦X, (BinProductObject A BinProd)⟧ := BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X) (identity X).

  Definition IdZeroMap {X : A} (BinProd : BinProduct A X X) :
    A⟦X, (BinProductObject A BinProd)⟧ := BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
                                                          (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X).

  Definition ZeroIdMap {X : A} (BinProd : BinProduct A X X) :
    A⟦X, (BinProductObject A BinProd)⟧ := BinProductArrow A BinProd (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
                                                          (identity X).

  (** Proofs that these maps are monics. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isMonic (DiagonalMap BinProd)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isMonic (DiagonalMap BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · DiagonalMap BinProd = v · DiagonalMap BinProd
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · DiagonalMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
v · DiagonalMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u
· (DiagonalMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
v
· (DiagonalMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
u = v
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd 
     (identity X) (identity X)
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
v
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd 
     (identity X) (identity X)
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · identity X = v · identity X
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u = v
u = v

    exact H.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isMonic (IdZeroMap BinProd)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isMonic (IdZeroMap BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · IdZeroMap BinProd = v · IdZeroMap BinProd
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · IdZeroMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
v · IdZeroMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · (IdZeroMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
v · (IdZeroMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
u = v
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd 
     (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
v
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd 
     (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · identity X = v · identity X
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u = v
u = v

    exact H.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isMonic (ZeroIdMap BinProd)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isMonic (ZeroIdMap BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · ZeroIdMap BinProd = v · ZeroIdMap BinProd
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · ZeroIdMap BinProd · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
v · ZeroIdMap BinProd · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · (ZeroIdMap BinProd · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
v · (ZeroIdMap BinProd · BinProductPr2 A BinProd)
u = v
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
     (identity X) · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
v
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
     (identity X) · BinProductPr2 A BinProd)
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u · identity X = v · identity X
u = v

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
x: A
u, v: A ⟦ x, X ⟧
H: u = v
u = v

    exact H.
  Qed.

  (** We show that Pr1 and Pr2 of BinProduct are epimorphisms. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (BinProductPr1 A BinProd)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (BinProductPr1 A BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
A
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
A ⟦ ?x, BinProd ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (?f · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
A
 exact X.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
A ⟦ X, BinProd ⟧
 exact (IdZeroMap BinProd).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (IdZeroMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (identity X)

      apply identity_isEpi.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (BinProductPr2 A BinProd)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (BinProductPr2 A BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
A
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
A ⟦ ?x, BinProd ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (?f · BinProductPr2 A BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
A
 exact X.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
A ⟦ X, BinProd ⟧
 exact (ZeroIdMap BinProd).
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (ZeroIdMap BinProd · BinProductPr2 A BinProd)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X)
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isEpi (identity X)

      apply identity_isEpi.
  Qed.

  (** We construct kernels of BinProduct Pr1 and Pr2. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
ZeroIdMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
ZeroIdMap BinProd · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
BinProductArrow A BinProd (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
  (identity X) · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X

    exact (BinProductPr1Commutes A _ _ BinProd _ _ (identity X)).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X) = h

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X) = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X)
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
    (identity X) · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X)
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X)
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X =
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
 apply idpath.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X)
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X)
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd) =
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd · identity X =
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd

      apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H: y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
    (identity X) = h
y = h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H: y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
    (identity X) = h
y = h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H: y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
    (identity X) = h
y =
y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X)
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H: y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
    (identity X) = h
y =
y
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X)
   · BinProductPr2 A BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H: y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
    (identity X) = h
y = y · identity X

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H: y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
    (identity X) = h
y = y
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroIdMap BinProd)
  (BinProductPr1 A BinProd) (KernelOfPr1_Eq BinProd)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
isKernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroIdMap BinProd)
  (BinProductPr1 A BinProd) (KernelOfPr1_Eq BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧),
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · ZeroIdMap BinProd = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, X ⟧, ψ · ZeroIdMap BinProd = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
ψ
· BinProductArrow A BinProd
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X) = h

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
A ⟦ w, X ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
(λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
 t
 · BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
     (identity X) = h) 
  ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
∏ y : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
    t
    · BinProductArrow A BinProd
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
        (identity X) = h) y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
∏ y : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
 t
 · BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) 
     (identity X) = h) y → 
y = ?x

    (* The arrow *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
A ⟦ w, X ⟧
 exact (h · (BinProductPr2 A BinProd)).
    (* commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
(λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
 t
 · BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X) = h)
  (h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd)
 exact (KernelOfPr1_isKernel_comm X BinProd w h H').
    (* equality of equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
∏ y : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
    t
    · BinProductArrow A BinProd
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X) = h)
     y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
    t
    · BinProductArrow A BinProd
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X) = h)
     y)
 apply hs.
    (* uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
∏ y : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
 t
 · BinProductArrow A BinProd
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) (identity X) = h) y
→ y = h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd
 exact (KernelOfPr1_isKernel_unique X BinProd w h H').
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (BinProductPr1 A BinProd)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (BinProductPr1 A BinProd)

    exact (make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (ZeroIdMap BinProd) _ (KernelOfPr1_Eq BinProd)
                     (KernelOfPr1_isKernel BinProd)).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
IdZeroMap BinProd · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
IdZeroMap BinProd · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) = h

· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) = h

· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd =
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd

· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd

· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)

   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd) =
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd

w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd · identity X =
h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd

      apply id_right.

X: A

· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd

w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =

h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X =

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X

H: y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) = h
y = h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd

w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧

· BinProductArrow A BinProd

y = h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd

y =

· BinProductPr1 A BinProd

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X

y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧

· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) = h
y = y
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

 t

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A

w: A

H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
A ⟦ w, X ⟧
 exact (h · (BinProductPr1 A BinProd)).
    (* Commutativity *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
(λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
 t
 · BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) = h)
  (h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)
 exact (KernelOfPr2_isKernel_comm X BinProd w h H').
    (* Equality of equalities of morphisms *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =

∏ y : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
    t
    · BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
    t
    · BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) = h) y)
 apply hs.
    (* Uniqueness *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
∏ y : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
 t
 · BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) = h) y
→ y = h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, BinProd ⟧
H': h · BinProductPr2 A BinProd =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X
y: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H: (λ t : A ⟦ w, X ⟧,
 t
 · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
     (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) = h)
  y
y = h · BinProductPr1 A BinProd
 exact (KernelOfPr2_isKernel_unique X BinProd w h H' y H).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (BinProductPr2 A BinProd)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A) (BinProductPr2 A BinProd)

    exact (make_Kernel (to_Zero A) (IdZeroMap BinProd) _ (KernelOfPr2_Eq BinProd)
                     (KernelOfPr2_isKernel BinProd)).
  Defined.

  (** From properties of abelian categories, it follows that Pr1 and Pr2 are
      cokernels of the above kernels since they are epimorphisms. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr1 BinProd))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr1 BinProd))

    exact (EpiToCokernel' A (make_Epi A _ (BinProductPr1_isEpi BinProd))
                          (KernelOfPr1 BinProd)).
  Defined.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))

    exact (EpiToCokernel' A (make_Epi A _ (BinProductPr2_isEpi BinProd))
                          (KernelOfPr2 BinProd)).
  Defined.

  (** We construct a cokernel of the DiagonalMap. The CokernelOb is the
      object X.*)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd)))

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
   · CokernelArrow (Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
is_z_isomorphism
  (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) · CokernelArrow coker)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
is_z_isomorphism r

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
is_z_isomorphism r

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)

  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
is_z_isomorphism r

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧

  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
isMonic r
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧

ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
isEpi r

    (* isMonic *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
isMonic r
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
isKernel (to_Zero A)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X) r
  (ZeroArrow_comp_left A (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X
     coker r)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ w, X ⟧),
h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
  ψ · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
∃! ψ : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
ψ · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h) 
  ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
∏ y : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
    t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h) y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
∏ y : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h) y
→ y = ?x

      (* The arrow *)
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)).
      (* Commutativity *)
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd 
     (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
   · CokernelArrow coker) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, ker ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H' · KernelArrow ker =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H' · DiagonalMap BinProd =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y · DiagonalMap BinProd =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w ker
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
H: y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w ker
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w ker

          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
y · identity X = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w ker

          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
tmp:= BinProductPr2Commutes A X X BinProd X
  (identity X) (identity X): BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (identity X)
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = 
identity X
y · identity X = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w ker

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
H: y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w ker
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A))

X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h

h

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)

  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧

  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X = y
y =
h
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X = y
y =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X)
    (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X = y
y =
y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X) (identity X)
· BinProductPr1 A BinProd
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X = y
y =
y
· (BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X) (identity X)
   · BinProductPr1 A BinProd)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X = y
y = y · identity X

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y:= KernelIn (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)) H': A ⟦ w, X ⟧
com1:= KernelCommutes (to_Zero A) ker w
  (h
   · BinProductArrow A BinProd 
       (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X))
  H': y
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (identity X) =
h
· BinProductArrow A BinProd 
    (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
H: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w X = y
y = y
 apply idpath.
      (* Equality on equalities of morphisms *)
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
∏ y : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
    t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y: A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
    t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h) y)
 apply hs.
      (* Uniqueness *)
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
∏ y : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h) y
→ y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ w, X ⟧
H': h · r = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w coker
y: A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧
H: (λ t : A ⟦ w, to_Zero A ⟧,
 t · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) X = h) y
y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) w (to_Zero A)
 apply ArrowsToZero.
    (* isEpi *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
isEpi r
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
isCokernel (to_Zero A) r
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A))
  (ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) X coker
     (to_Zero A) r)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
∏ (w : A) (h : A ⟦ coker, w ⟧),
r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
→ ∃! ψ : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
  ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · ψ = h

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
∃! ψ : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · ψ = h

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h) 
  ?x
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
∏ y : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
    ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h) y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
∏ y : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h) y
→ y = ?x

      (* The arrow *)
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧
 exact (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w).
      (* Commutativity *)
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
coker2:= CokernelOfKernelOfPr2 BinProd: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
coker2:= CokernelOfKernelOfPr2 BinProd: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
coker2ar:= CokernelArrow coker2: A ⟦ BinProd, coker2 ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
coker2:= CokernelOfKernelOfPr2 BinProd: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
coker2ar:= BinProductPr2 A BinProd: A ⟦ BinProd, X ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
coker2:= CokernelOfKernelOfPr2 BinProd: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
coker2ar:= BinProductPr2 A BinProd: A ⟦ BinProd, X ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧

  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd

  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A

H': BinProductArrow A BinProd

· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w

  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))

(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)

X: A

· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧

  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))

· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =

  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))

y:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': A ⟦ coker2, w ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)

w: A

H': BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
coker2:= CokernelOfKernelOfPr2 BinProd: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
coker2ar:= BinProductPr2 A BinProd: A ⟦ BinProd, X ⟧
y:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': A ⟦ X, w ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': CokernelArrow coker2
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 w
    (CokernelArrow coker · h) H' =
CokernelArrow coker · h
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)

X: A

ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)

ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)

w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': BinProductArrow A BinProd

· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w

  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': BinProductPr2 A BinProd · y =
CokernelArrow coker · h
H: y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)

  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)

ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)

w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w

  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
coker2ar:= BinProductPr2 A BinProd: A ⟦ BinProd, X ⟧
y:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': A ⟦ X, w ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': BinProductPr2 A BinProd · y =
CokernelArrow coker · h
tmp:= BinProductPr2Commutes A X X BinProd X
  (identity X) (identity X): BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (identity X)
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = 
identity X
identity X · y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w

coker2ar:= BinProductPr2 A BinProd: A ⟦ BinProd, X ⟧
y:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': A ⟦ X, w ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': BinProductPr2 A BinProd · y =
CokernelArrow coker · h
tmp:= BinProductPr2Commutes A X X BinProd X
  (identity X) (identity X): BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (identity X)
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = 
identity X
BinProductArrow A BinProd (identity X) (identity X)
· CokernelArrow coker · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w

          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
coker2:= CokernelOfKernelOfPr2 BinProd: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
coker2ar:= BinProductPr2 A BinProd: A ⟦ BinProd, X ⟧
y:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': A ⟦ X, w ⟧
com1:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': BinProductPr2 A BinProd · y =
CokernelArrow coker · h
tmp:= BinProductPr2Commutes A X X BinProd X
  (identity X) (identity X): BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (identity X)
· BinProductPr2 A BinProd = 
identity X
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X coker · h =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w

          apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
coker2:= CokernelOfKernelOfPr2 BinProd: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
coker2ar:= BinProductPr2 A BinProd: A ⟦ BinProd, X ⟧

  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': A ⟦ X, w ⟧

  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': BinProductPr2 A BinProd · y =
CokernelArrow coker · h
H: y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)

  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =
