A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
coker2:= CokernelOfKernelOfPr2 BinProd: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
coker2ar:= BinProductPr2 A BinProd: A ⟦ BinProd, X ⟧
y:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': A ⟦ X, w ⟧
com1: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker w = h
H: y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (CokernelArrow coker · h) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
coker2:= CokernelOfKernelOfPr2 BinProd: Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (KernelArrow (KernelOfPr2 BinProd))
coker2ar:= BinProductPr2 A BinProd: A ⟦ BinProd, X ⟧
y:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) coker2 w
  (CokernelArrow coker · h) H': A ⟦ X, w ⟧
com1: ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker w = h
H: y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A)
· ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker w

        apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
      (* Equality on equalities of morphisms. *)
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
∏ y : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
    ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h) y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
y: A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
    ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h) y)
 apply hs.
      (* Uniqueness *)
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
∏ y : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h) y
→ y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
coker:= Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd): Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A)
  (DiagonalMap BinProd)
r:= BinProductArrow A BinProd 
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow coker: A ⟦ X, coker ⟧
M:= make_Monic A (DiagonalMap BinProd)
  (DiagonalMap_isMonic BinProd): Monic A X BinProd
ker:= MonicToKernel M: Kernels.Kernel (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelArrow (to_Cokernels A X BinProd M))
w: A
h: A ⟦ coker, w ⟧
H': r · h = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X w
y: A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧
H: (λ t : A ⟦ to_Zero A, w ⟧,
 ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) coker (to_Zero A) · t = h)
  y
y = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) (to_Zero A) w
 apply ArrowsFromZero.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (DiagonalMap BinProd)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (DiagonalMap BinProd)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
BinProd: BinProduct A X X
X0:= z_iso_inv
  (make_z_iso
     (BinProductArrow A BinProd 
        (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
      · CokernelArrow
          (Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd)))
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso BinProd))
     (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso BinProd)): z_iso (Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd)) X
Cokernels.Cokernel (to_Zero A) (DiagonalMap BinProd)

    exact (Cokernel_up_to_iso A (to_Zero A) _
                              (CokernelArrow (Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd)) · X0)
                              (Cokernel (DiagonalMap BinProd)) X0 (idpath _)).
  Defined.

  (** We define the op which makes the homsets of an abelian category to abelian
    groups. *)
  Definition Abelian_minus_op {X Y : A} (f g : X --> Y) : A⟦X, Y⟧ :=
    (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) f g)
      · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)).

  Definition Abelian_op (X Y : A) : binop (A⟦X, Y⟧) :=
    (λ f : _, λ g : _, Abelian_minus_op f (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) _ _) g)).

  (** Construction of a precategory with binops from Abelian category. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
precategoryWithBinOps

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
precategoryWithBinOps

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
precategoryWithBinOpsData A

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
∏ x y : A, binop (A ⟦ x, y ⟧)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: A
binop (A ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 exact (Abelian_op x y).
  Defined.

  (** We need the following lemmas to prove that the homsets of an abelian
      precategory are abelian groups. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (identity Y) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (identity Y)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (identity Y)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (identity Y)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (identity Y) (identity Y)
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y = identity X · f

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y = f
 apply id_right.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (identity Y)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (identity Y) (identity Y)
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (identity X)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y = identity X · f

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f · identity Y = f
 apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
ar:= BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X)
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X))): A ⟦ X,
Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)) ⟧
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
ar:= BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X)
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X))): A ⟦ X,
Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)) ⟧
r:= make_z_iso ar
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
        (to_BinProducts A X X)))
  (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso (to_BinProducts A X X)): z_iso X
  (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)))
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
ar:= BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X)
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X))): A ⟦ X,
Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)) ⟧
r:= make_z_iso ar
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
        (to_BinProducts A X X)))
  (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso (to_BinProducts A X X)): z_iso X
  (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)))
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (CokernelArrow
     (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
          (to_BinProducts A X X))) = identity X
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
ar:= BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X)
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X))): A ⟦ X,
Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)) ⟧
r:= make_z_iso ar
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
        (to_BinProducts A X X)))
  (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso (to_BinProducts A X X)): z_iso X
  (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)))
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (CokernelArrow
     (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
          (to_BinProducts A X X))) = identity X
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
ar:= BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X)
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X))): A ⟦ X,
Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)) ⟧
r:= make_z_iso ar
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
        (to_BinProducts A X X)))
  (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso (to_BinProducts A X X)): z_iso X
  (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)))
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (CokernelArrow
     (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
          (to_BinProducts A X X))) = identity X
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X: A
ar:= BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X)
  (identity X) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X))): A ⟦ X,
Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)) ⟧
r:= make_z_iso ar
  (is_z_isomorphism_mor
     (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
        (to_BinProducts A X X)))
  (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso (to_BinProducts A X X)): z_iso X
  (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)))
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)))
· is_z_isomorphism_mor
    (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
 exact (is_inverse_in_precat1 r).
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
let bp1 := to_BinProducts A X X in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1) · f =
BinProductArrow A bp2 (BinProductPr1 A bp1 · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1 · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
let bp1 := to_BinProducts A X X in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1) · f =
BinProductArrow A bp2 (BinProductPr1 A bp1 · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1 · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
let bp1 := bpX in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1) · f =
BinProductArrow A bp2 (BinProductPr1 A bp1 · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1 · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
let bp1 := bpX in
let bp2 := bpY in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1) · f =
BinProductArrow A bp2 (BinProductPr1 A bp1 · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1 · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
let bp1 := bpX in
let bp2 := bpY in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1) · f =
BinProductArrow A bp2 (BinProductPr1 A bp1 · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1 · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) · f =
BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)

    (* Cancel precomposition *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) · f = ar

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) · f = ar

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
DiagonalMap bpX
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
DiagonalMap bpX
· BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X
  (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
f · DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X
  (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
f · DiagonalMap bpY
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
f
· (DiagonalMap bpY
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)

      apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) · f = ar

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) · f = ar

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) · f = ar

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) · f =
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
    (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
f =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H

    (* rewrite and use com *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
f =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
f =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
f =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
f =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f) =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f) · BinProductPr1 A bpY =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr1 A bpY

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧

  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)

· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow

identity Y

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f) · BinProductPr2 A bpY =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr2 A bpY

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧

    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X

· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f) · BinProductPr1 A bpY =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f) · BinProductPr1 A bpY) =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr1 A bpY

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f) =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr1 A bpY
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) · BinProductPr1 A bpX
· f =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr1 A bpY

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧

  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
identity X · f =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr1 A bpY

X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)

    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X

    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =

f =

· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr1 A bpY

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
f =
f
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
   · BinProductPr1 A bpY)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
f = f · identity Y

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
f = f
 apply idpath.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f) · BinProductPr2 A bpY =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr2 A bpY
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f) · BinProductPr2 A bpY) =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr2 A bpY

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X)
· (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f) =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr2 A bpY
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A X X) (identity X)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X) · BinProductPr2 A bpX
· f =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr2 A bpY

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧

ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧

  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X · f =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr2 A bpY

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧

  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)

· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X

· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧

f
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
   · BinProductPr2 A bpY)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧

  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X · f =
f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X X · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y

        apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
f =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
f · identity Y =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
f
· (IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar'
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧

  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)

e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧

  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)

· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧

f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y

  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧

  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
