e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
identity (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
    (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
   · (CokernelArrow
        (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
             (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))) =
identity X
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) Y
    ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
   · (CokernelArrow
        (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
             (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))) =
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) Y
    ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
   · (CokernelArrow
        (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
      · is_z_isomorphism_mor
          (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
             (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))) =
IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X))
   · CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
       Y ar H)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· (CokernelArrow
     (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
CokernelArrow
  (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) Y
    ar H
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpX:= to_BinProducts A X X: BinProduct A X X
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
ar:= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY): A ⟦ bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY ⟧
H: DiagonalMap bpX · ar =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
g:= CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: A ⟦ CokernelOfDiagonal bpX, CokernelOfDiagonal bpY
⟧
com:= CokernelCommutes (to_Zero A)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
  (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) ar H: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX)
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
ar H = ar
e1:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero X: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X)) =
identity X
e2:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
identity Y
ar':= BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f): A ⟦ bpX, bpY ⟧
e3: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A X X) · ar' =
f · IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
CokernelArrow
  (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A X X))
· CokernelOut (to_Zero A) (CokernelOfDiagonal bpX) Y
    ar H =
BinProductArrow A bpY (BinProductPr1 A bpX · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A bpX · f)
· (CokernelArrow
     (Cokernel (DiagonalMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
   · is_z_isomorphism_mor
       (CokernelOfDiagonal_is_iso
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

    apply com.
  Qed.

  (** Construction of morphisms to BinProducts. *)
  Definition Abelian_mor_to_BinProd {X Y : A} (f g : X --> Y) :
    A⟦X, (BinProductObject A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))⟧ :=
    BinProductArrow _ (to_BinProducts A Y Y) f g.

  Definition Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd {X Y : A} (f g : X --> Y) :
    A⟦BinProductObject A (to_BinProducts A X X), BinProductObject A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)⟧ :=
    BinProductArrow _ (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
                    (BinProductPr1 _ (to_BinProducts A X X) · f)
                    (BinProductPr2 _ (to_BinProducts A X X) · g).

  (** A few equations Abelian_minus_op and Abelian_op. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd a b)
  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd c d) =
Abelian_mor_to_BinProd (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd a b)
  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd c d) =
Abelian_mor_to_BinProd (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
com1:= Abelian_op_eq (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd a b)
  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd c d) =
Abelian_mor_to_BinProd (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
com1:= Abelian_op_eq (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
com2:= Abelian_op_eq
  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd a b)
  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd c d) =
Abelian_mor_to_BinProd (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in

  (BinProductPr2 A bp1

   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd a b)
  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd c d)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
Abelian_mor_to_BinProd
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in

· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =

  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d

       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)

  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in

   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (BinProductPr1 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
      · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     (BinProductPr2 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
      · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

     (BinProductPr2 A

           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
com1:= Abelian_op_eq (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in

· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
    (BinProductPr2 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =

· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =

  (BinProductPr2 A bp1

BinProductArrow A

  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)

    (BinProductPr2 A

          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =

BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
    (BinProductPr2 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
com1:= Abelian_op_eq
  (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
com2:= Abelian_op_eq
  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A 
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
    (BinProductPr2 A
       (to_BinProducts A 
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in

  (BinProductPr1 A bp1

  (BinProductPr2 A bp1

  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
    (BinProductPr2 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in

· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =

  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
    (BinProductPr2 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) = a

  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· BinProductPr2 A
    (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
       (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) = c

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
com1:= Abelian_op_eq (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
com2:= Abelian_op_eq
  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) = c

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
com2:= Abelian_op_eq
  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
c = c

        apply idpath.

X, Y: A

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in

  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in

  (BinProductPr2 A bp1

· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d

       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in

· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in

  (BinProductPr1 A bp1

  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
com1:= Abelian_op_eq (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)

  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in

  (BinProductPr1 A bp1

  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (BinProductPr1 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
      · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     (BinProductPr2 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
      · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) = b
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
com1:= Abelian_op_eq (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
com2:= Abelian_op_eq
  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)): let bp1 :=
  to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A Y Y in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
  (BinProductPr1 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A bp1
   · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (BinProductPr1 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
      · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     (BinProductPr2 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
      · BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
   · BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = b

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_mor_to_BinProd (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd a b)
  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd c d)
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd
    (CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
    (CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
Abelian_mor_to_BinProd
  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd a b
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd c d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

  (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd c d

   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· BinProductArrow A
    (to_BinProducts A
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
    (BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · CokernelArrow
         (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
    (BinProductPr2 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · CokernelArrow
         (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· BinProductPr1 A
    (to_BinProducts A
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· BinProductPr1 A
    (to_BinProducts A
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· (BinProductArrow A
     (to_BinProducts A
        (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
        (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
     (BinProductPr1 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
      · CokernelArrow
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
     (BinProductPr2 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
   · BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))) =

· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

· (BinProductPr1 A
     (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
        (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
   · CokernelArrow

 apply idpath.

· (BinProductPr2 A

   · CokernelArrow

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A

BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a b)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d)
· BinProductPr2 A
    (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
       (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) c d
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a b)
  (Abelian_minus_op c d) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a b)
  (Abelian_minus_op c d) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    (* Rewrite Abelian_minus_op_eq1 *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (Abelian_minus_op a b) (Abelian_minus_op c d)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd a c) (Abelian_mor_to_BinProd b d) =
Abelian_mor_to_BinProd (Abelian_minus_op a b) (Abelian_minus_op c d)
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (Abelian_minus_op a b) (Abelian_minus_op c d)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
(BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (Abelian_minus_op a b)
(Abelian_minus_op c d)
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (Abelian_minus_op a b) (Abelian_minus_op c d)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
(BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (Abelian_minus_op a b)
(Abelian_minus_op c d)
Abelian_minus_op
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    (* Rewrite com *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
(BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (Abelian_minus_op a b)
(Abelian_minus_op c d)
com:= Abelian_op_eq
  (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))): let bp1 := to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 :=
to_BinProducts A (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
(CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
(BinProductPr1 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
(BinProductPr2 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
Abelian_minus_op
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
(BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (Abelian_minus_op a b)
(Abelian_minus_op c d)
com:= Abelian_op_eq
  (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))): let bp1 := to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 :=
to_BinProducts A (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
(CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
(BinProductPr1 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
(BinProductPr2 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
(BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (Abelian_minus_op a b)
(Abelian_minus_op c d)
com:= Abelian_op_eq
  (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))): let bp1 := to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 :=
to_BinProducts A (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
(CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
(BinProductPr1 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
(BinProductPr2 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
(BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (Abelian_minus_op a b)
(Abelian_minus_op c d)
com:= Abelian_op_eq
  (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))): let bp1 := to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 :=
to_BinProducts A (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
(CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
(BinProductPr1 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
(BinProductPr2 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)
· (BinProductArrow A
     (to_BinProducts A
        (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
        (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
     (BinProductPr1 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
      · CokernelArrow
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
     (BinProductPr2 A
        (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
           (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
      · CokernelArrow
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A
             (CokernelOfDiagonal
                (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
             (CokernelOfDiagonal
                (to_BinProducts A Y Y))))) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    (* Cancel postcompostion *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat

X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  (CokernelArrow

· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)
· BinProductArrow A
    (to_BinProducts A
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
    (BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · CokernelArrow
         (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
    (BinProductPr2 A
       (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · CokernelArrow
         (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal
       (to_BinProducts A
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)

  (CokernelArrow

    (CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =

          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)
· BinProductArrow A

    (BinProductPr1 A

    (BinProductPr2 A

          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal
       (to_BinProducts A
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)

     · CokernelArrow
         (CokernelOfDiagonal

  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)

X, Y: A

(Abelian_minus_op c d)

  (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))): let bp1 := to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in

to_BinProducts A (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =

· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)

    (to_BinProducts A
       (CokernelOfDiagonal

          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

       (CokernelOfDiagonal

  (to_BinProducts A
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))

  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))

    (CokernelOfDiagonal
       (to_BinProducts A
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))) =
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op a c)
  (Abelian_minus_op b d)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
(BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (Abelian_minus_op a b)
(Abelian_minus_op c d)
com:= Abelian_op_eq
  (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))): let bp1 := to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 :=
to_BinProducts A (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
(CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
(BinProductPr1 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
(BinProductPr2 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
tmp1:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq2 a c b d: BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)
· BinProductArrow A
    (to_BinProducts A
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
    (BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A 
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · CokernelArrow
         (CokernelOfDiagonal
            (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
    (BinProductPr2 A
       (to_BinProducts A 
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · CokernelArrow
         (CokernelOfDiagonal
            (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (Abelian_minus_op a c) (Abelian_minus_op b d)

    (* Use idpath *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
a, b, c, d: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq1 a c b d: Abelian_minus_op (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
(BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (Abelian_minus_op a b)
(Abelian_minus_op c d)
com:= Abelian_op_eq
  (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))): let bp1 := to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (to_BinProducts A Y Y) in
let bp2 :=
to_BinProducts A (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
(CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) =
BinProductArrow A bp2
(BinProductPr1 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
(BinProductPr2 A bp1
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
tmp1:= AbelianPreCat_op_eq2 a c b d: BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d)
· BinProductArrow A
    (to_BinProducts A
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
    (BinProductPr1 A
       (to_BinProducts A 
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · CokernelArrow
         (CokernelOfDiagonal
            (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
    (BinProductPr2 A
       (to_BinProducts A 
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     · CokernelArrow
         (CokernelOfDiagonal
            (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal
          (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
BinProductArrow A
  (to_BinProducts A
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) a c
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) b d
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)))
 apply idpath.
  Qed.


  (** ** AbelianPreCat is CategoryWithAdditiveStructure *)

  (** The zero element in a homset of A is given by the ZeroArrow. *)
  Definition AbelianPreCat_homset_zero (X Y : A) : A⟦X, Y⟧ := ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y.

  (** Some equations involving Abelian_minus_op and Abelian_op. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) = f

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op f (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) = f
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: IdZeroMap (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = identity Y
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = f
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (identity Y)
(ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = identity Y
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (identity Y)
(ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = identity Y
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (identity Y)
(ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = identity Y
e: BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq_IdZero Y: BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) (identity Y)
(ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = identity Y
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) =
f
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y) =
f

    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) =
f

    (identity Y) (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)

(ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y)) = identity Y
f · identity Y = f
 apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) = f

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) = f

X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y f (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) = f

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op f
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)) = f

X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op f
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A Y Y))) =
f

X, Y: A

  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A Y Y)

Abelian_minus_op f
  (BinProductArrow A bpY (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)) =
Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)

X, Y: A

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
e: BinProductArrow A bpY (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
Abelian_minus_op f
  (BinProductArrow A bpY (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)) =

X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)
Abelian_minus_op f
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)) =
Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition AbelianPreCat_homset_inv {X Y : A} (f : X --> Y) :
    A⟦X, Y⟧ := Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) _ _) f.

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op f f = AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
e: BinProductArrow A bpY f f =
f
· BinProductArrow A bpY (identity Y) (identity Y)
BinProductArrow A bpY f f
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
e: BinProductArrow A bpY f f =
f
· BinProductArrow A bpY (identity Y) (identity Y)
f · BinProductArrow A bpY (identity Y) (identity Y)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
e: BinProductArrow A bpY f f =
f
· BinProductArrow A bpY (identity Y) (identity Y)
f
· (BinProductArrow A bpY (identity Y) (identity Y)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY)) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
bpY:= to_BinProducts A Y Y: BinProduct A Y Y
e: BinProductArrow A bpY f f =
f
· BinProductArrow A bpY (identity Y) (identity Y)
f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) Y (CokernelOfDiagonal bpY) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y
 apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f) f =
AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f) f =
AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) f) f =
AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y

X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) f) f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) f)
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) f) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y))
  (Abelian_minus_op f f) = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
  (Abelian_minus_op f f) = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
  (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y

    apply AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right'.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f = f

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right' f: Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) = f
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp: Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
(Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)) =
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp: Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f =
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
(Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp: Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f =
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
(Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
  (Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)) =
f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp: Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f =
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
(Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))
Abelian_minus_op (Abelian_minus_op f f)
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     (Abelian_minus_op f
        (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))) = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp: Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f =
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
(Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op f (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y))
  (Abelian_minus_op f
     (Abelian_minus_op f
        (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))) = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp: Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f =
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
(Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))
Abelian_minus_op f
  (Abelian_minus_op f
     (Abelian_minus_op f
        (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))) = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp: Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f =
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
(Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))
Abelian_minus_op f (Abelian_minus_op f f) = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp: Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f =
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
(Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))
Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) = f

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp: Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f) f =
Abelian_op X Y (Abelian_minus_op f f)
(Abelian_minus_op f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))
f = f

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f)
  g =
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) g)
  f

  (Abelian_minus_op g (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)) =
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
     (Abelian_minus_op g
        (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y))) f

  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) g)

     (Abelian_minus_op g

  f =

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y f g = Abelian_op X Y g f

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y f g = Abelian_op X Y g f

    (* Use zero left for f *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp1:= AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f: Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
  f = f
Abelian_op X Y f g = Abelian_op X Y g f

    
A: AbelianPreCat

X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp1: Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_op X Y
     (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f) g =
Abelian_op X Y f g
Abelian_op X Y f g = Abelian_op X Y g f

X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp1: Abelian_op X Y f g =
Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_op X Y
     (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f) g
Abelian_op X Y f g = Abelian_op X Y g f

X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp1: Abelian_op X Y f g =
Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_op X Y
     (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f) g
Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f) g =
Abelian_op X Y g f

f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  (Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f) g =

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A

  g = g
Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f) g =

f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  (Abelian_op X Y
     (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) g) f =

X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp2: Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_op X Y
     (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) g) f =

hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f) g =
Abelian_op X Y
  (Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) g) f

    (* The goal follows from eq3 and comm' *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) f))
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g) =
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g))
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y))
  (Abelian_minus_op
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) f)
     g) =
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g))
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y))
  (Abelian_minus_op
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) f)
     g) =
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y))
  (Abelian_minus_op
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g)
     f)

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y))
  (Abelian_minus_op
     (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
        g) f) =
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y))
  (Abelian_minus_op
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g)
     f)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g)) =

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left g: Abelian_op X Y (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) g = g
Abelian_minus_op f
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g)) =
Abelian_minus_op f g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left g: Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
(Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g) = g
Abelian_minus_op f
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g)) =
Abelian_minus_op f g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left g: Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
(Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g) = g
Abelian_minus_op f
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g)) =
Abelian_minus_op f g

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
tmp:= AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left g: Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
(Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g) = g
Abelian_minus_op f g = Abelian_minus_op f g
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
X, Y: A
f, g: A ⟦ X, Y ⟧
Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
  (Abelian_op X Y f g) =
Abelian_minus_op

(AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)) (Abelian_op X Y f g)
tmp2:= AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left g: Abelian_minus_op
  (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y)
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y)
     g) = g

  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f)
  g =
Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero X Y) f)
  g

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

Abelian_minus_op
  (Abelian_minus_op f
     (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) X Y) g))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
f, g, h: make_hSet
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
to_binop x y (to_binop x y f g) h =
to_binop x y f (to_binop x y g h)
 apply AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc.

  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)

 apply AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left.

x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
f: make_hSet
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
to_binop x y f (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y) = f
 apply AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
invstruct (to_binop x y)
  (((λ f g
        h : make_hSet
              (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
              (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
     AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc f g h)
    :
    isassoc (to_binop x y)),,
   make_isunital (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)
     (((λ f : make_hSet
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                 ⟧)
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
        AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f)
       :
       islunit (to_binop x y)
         (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)),,
      ((λ f : make_hSet
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                 ⟧)
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
        AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right f)
       :
       isrunit (to_binop x y)
         (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y))))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
make_hSet (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
→ make_hSet (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
(λ inv0 : make_hSet
            (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
            (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
          → make_hSet
              (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
              (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
 isinv (to_binop x y)
   (unel_is
      (((λ f g
            h : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
         AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc f g h)
        :
        isassoc (to_binop x y)),,
       make_isunital (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)
         (((λ f : make_hSet
                    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
                     ⟦ x, y ⟧)
                    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x
                       y),
            AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f)
           :
           islunit (to_binop x y)
             (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)),,
          ((λ f : make_hSet
                    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
                     ⟦ x, y ⟧)
                    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x
                       y),
            AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right f)
           :
           isrunit (to_binop x y)
             (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y))))) inv0)
  ?pr1

x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
