  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
→ make_hSet (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
f: make_hSet
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
make_hSet (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
 apply (AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f).
        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
(λ inv0 : make_hSet
            (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
            (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
          → make_hSet
              (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
              (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
 isinv (to_binop x y)
   (unel_is
      (((λ f g
            h : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
         AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc f g h)
        :
        isassoc (to_binop x y)),,
       make_isunital (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)
         (((λ f : make_hSet
                    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
                     ⟦ x, y ⟧)
                    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x
                       y),
            AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f)
           :
           islunit (to_binop x y)
             (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)),,
          ((λ f : make_hSet
                    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
                     ⟦ x, y ⟧)
                    (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x
                       y),
            AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right f)
           :
           isrunit (to_binop x y)
             (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y))))) inv0)
  (λ f : make_hSet
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
   AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
islinv (to_binop x y)
  (unel_is
     ((λ f g
          h : make_hSet
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                 ⟧)
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
       AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc f g h),,
      make_isunital (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)
        ((λ f : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
          AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f),,
         (λ f : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
          AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right f))))
  (λ f : make_hSet
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
   AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
isrinv (to_binop x y)
  (unel_is
     ((λ f g
          h : make_hSet
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                 ⟧)
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
       AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc f g h),,
      make_isunital (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)
        ((λ f : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
          AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f),,
         (λ f : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
          AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right f))))
  (λ f : make_hSet
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
   AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f)

          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
islinv (to_binop x y)
  (unel_is
     ((λ f g
          h : make_hSet
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                 ⟧)
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
       AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc f g h),,
      make_isunital (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)
        ((λ f : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
          AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f),,
         (λ f : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
          AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right f))))
  (λ f : make_hSet
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
   AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
f: make_hSet
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
to_binop x y (AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f) f =
unel_is
  ((λ f g
       h : make_hSet
             (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
             (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
    AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc f g h),,
   make_isunital (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)
     ((λ f : make_hSet
               (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                ⟧)
               (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
       AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f),,
      (λ f : make_hSet
               (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                ⟧)
               (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
       AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right f)))
 apply AbelianPreCat_homset_inv_left.
          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
isrinv (to_binop x y)
  (unel_is
     ((λ f g
          h : make_hSet
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                 ⟧)
                (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
       AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc f g h),,
      make_isunital (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)
        ((λ f : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
          AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f),,
         (λ f : make_hSet
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x,
                   y ⟧)
                  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
          AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right f))))
  (λ f : make_hSet
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
           (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
   AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
f: make_hSet
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
to_binop x y f (AbelianPreCat_homset_inv f) =
unel_is
  ((λ f g
       h : make_hSet
             (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
             (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
    AbelianPreCat_homset_assoc f g h),,
   make_isunital (AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y)
     ((λ f : make_hSet
               (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                ⟧)
               (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
       AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_left f),,
      (λ f : make_hSet
               (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y
                ⟧)
               (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y),
       AbelianPreCat_homset_zero_right f)))
 apply AbelianPreCat_homset_inv_right.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
iscomm (to_binop x y)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y: AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
f, g: make_hSet
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops ⟦ x, y ⟧)
  (AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops x y)
to_binop x y f g = to_binop x y g f
 apply AbelianPreCat_homset_comm.
  Defined.

  (** We prove that Abelian_precategories are PrecategoriesWithAbgrops. *)
  Definition AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops :
    categoryWithAbgrops := make_categoryWithAbgrops
                             AbelianToprecategoryWithBinops
                             AbelianTocategoryWithAbgropsData.

  (** Hide isPreAdditive behind Qed. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
isPreAdditive AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
isPreAdditive AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
∏ (x y z : AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops)
(f : AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
∏ (x y z : AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops)
(f : AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)

    (* precomposition ismonoidfun *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
∏ (x y z : AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops)
(f : AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
ismonoidfun (to_premor z f)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
isbinopfun (to_premor z f)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_premor z f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
isbinopfun (to_premor z f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (y --> z)%abgrcat)
to_premor z f (x' + x'0)%addmonoid =
(to_premor z f x' + to_premor z f x'0)%addmonoid
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (y --> z)%abgrcat)
f · (x' + x'0)%addmonoid =
(f · x' + f · x'0)%addmonoid

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (y --> z)%abgrcat)
f · Abelian_op y z x' x'0 =
Abelian_op x z (f · x') (f · x'0)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (y --> z)%abgrcat)
f
· Abelian_minus_op x'
    (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) x'0) =
Abelian_minus_op (f · x')
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (f · x'0))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (y --> z)%abgrcat)
f
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z) x'
     (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) x'0
      · CokernelArrow
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z)))
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z) (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z) (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))

hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
f
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z) x'
     (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) x'0
      · CokernelArrow
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z)))
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z) (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z) (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A

f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
f
· BinProductArrow A bpz x'
    (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z)
       x'0 · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))

f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧

bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (f · x'0)

   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))

e: BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A bpz

f
· BinProductArrow A bpz x'
    (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z)
       x'0 · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A

f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧

bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= ZeroArrow_comp_right A (to_Zero A) x y z f: f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A bpz
     (f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))

          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp: BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
(BinProductArrow A bpz (f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) (f · x'0)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
(BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z) (f · x'0)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A bpz
     (f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))

          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A

f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp: BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
(BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z) (f · x'0)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
(BinProductArrow A bpz (f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) (f · x'0)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =

  (BinProductArrow A bpz
     (f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) (f · x'0)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
 apply tmp.

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops

x', x'0: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
f
· BinProductArrow A bpz x'

  (f
   · BinProductArrow AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops bpz
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) x'0

A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
f
· BinProductArrow A bpz x'
    (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z)
       x'0 · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (f · x')
  (f
   · (BinProductArrow AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops bpz
        (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) x'0
      · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ y, z ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
f
· BinProductArrow A bpz x'
    (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z)
       x'0 · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)) =
f
· BinProductArrow AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops bpz x'
    (BinProductArrow AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops bpz
       (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z) x'0
     · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
 apply idpath.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
to_premor z f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · AbelianPreCat_homset_zero y z =
AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x z

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) y z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

        apply ZeroArrow_comp_right.
    (* postcomposition is monoidfun *)
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
∏ (x y z : AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops)
(f : AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧),
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
ismonoidfun (to_postmor x f)

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
isbinopfun (to_postmor x f)
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_postmor x f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
isbinopfun (to_postmor x f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (x --> y)%abgrcat)
to_postmor x f (x' + x'0)%addmonoid =
(to_postmor x f x' + to_postmor x f x'0)%addmonoid
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (x --> y)%abgrcat)
(x' + x'0)%addmonoid · f =
(x' · f + x'0 · f)%addmonoid

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (x --> y)%abgrcat)
Abelian_op x y x' x'0 · f =
Abelian_op x z (x' · f) (x'0 · f)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (x --> y)%abgrcat)
Abelian_minus_op x'
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0)
· f =
Abelian_minus_op (x' · f)
  (Abelian_minus_op (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (x'0 · f))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: Groups2.grtomonoid (AbelianGroups.abgrtogr (x --> y)%abgrcat)
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z) (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z) (x'0 · f)
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z) (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z) (x'0 · f)
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A bpz (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (x'0 · f)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
e: BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A bpz (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (x'0 · f)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f

          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) · BinProductPr1 A bpz =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
· BinProductPr1 A bpz
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) · BinProductPr2 A bpz =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
· BinProductPr2 A bpz

          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) · BinProductPr1 A bpz =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
· BinProductPr1 A bpz
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) · BinProductPr1 A bpz =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· BinProductPr1 A bpz

            
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) · BinProductPr1 A bpz =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
     (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
   · BinProductPr1 A bpz)

            
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
     (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
   · BinProductPr1 A bpz)

            
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)

            
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f

            
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f

            
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z = ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

            apply idpath.
          
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) · BinProductPr2 A bpz =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
· BinProductPr2 A bpz
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) · BinProductPr2 A bpz =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
    (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
    (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· BinProductPr2 A bpz

            
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) · BinProductPr2 A bpz =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
     (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
   · BinProductPr2 A bpz)

            
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
x'0 · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
     (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
     (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
   · BinProductPr2 A bpz)

f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
x'0 · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)

            
A: AbelianPreCat

x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧

BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f

            
A: AbelianPreCat

x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
x'0 · f = x'0 · f

            apply idpath.
        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
e: BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A bpz (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
     (x'0 · f)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
e: BinProductArrow A bpz (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z)
  (x'0 · f) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
  (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
· Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A bpz (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A bpz (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · Abelian_mor_from_to_BinProd f f
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A bpz (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
       (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
       (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
   · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
        (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
        (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
      · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq f: let bp1 := to_BinProducts A y y in
let bp2 := to_BinProducts A z z in
CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp1) · f =
BinProductArrow A bp2 (BinProductPr1 A bp1 · f) (BinProductPr2 A bp1 · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bp2)
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
        (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
        (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
      · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq f: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
(BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
(BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f) =
BinProductArrow A bpz (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
        (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
        (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
      · CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)))
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal bpz)
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq f: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
(BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
(BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z) (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
        (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
        (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
      · CokernelArrow
          (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq f: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
(BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
(BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z) (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · (CokernelArrow
        (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y))
      · f))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))

x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧

bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq f: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
(BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
(BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z) (x' · f)
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq f: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
(BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
(BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· BinProductOfArrows A (to_BinProducts A z z)
    (to_BinProducts A y y) f f
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq f: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
(BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
(BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· (CokernelArrow
     (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f) =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y) x'
  (BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A y y)
     (ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y) x'0
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)))
· (BinProductOfArrows A (to_BinProducts A z z)
     (to_BinProducts A y y) f f
   · CokernelArrow
       (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z)))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq f: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
(BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
(BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))
CokernelArrow
  (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductOfArrows A (to_BinProducts A z z)
  (to_BinProducts A y y) f f
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
x', x'0: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
bpz:= to_BinProducts A z z: BinProduct A z z
tmp:= Abelian_op_eq f: CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
(BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
(BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· CokernelArrow (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))
CokernelArrow
  (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A y y)) · f =
BinProductArrow A (to_BinProducts A z z)
  (BinProductPr1 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
  (BinProductPr2 A (to_BinProducts A y y) · f)
· CokernelArrow
    (CokernelOfDiagonal (to_BinProducts A z z))

        apply tmp.
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
to_postmor x f 0%abgrcat = 0%abgrcat
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
0%abgrcat · f = 0%abgrcat
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x y · f =
AbelianPreCat_homset_zero x z

        
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
x, y, z: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops
f: AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops ⟦ y, z ⟧
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x y · f =
ZeroArrow (to_Zero A) x z

        apply ZeroArrow_comp_left.
  Qed.

  (** We prove that Abelian_precategories are PreAddtitive. *)
  Definition AbelianToPreAdditive :
    PreAdditive := make_PreAdditive AbelianTocategoryWithAbgrops AbelianToisPreAdditive.

  (** Finally, we show that Abelian_precategories are CategoryWithAdditiveStructure. *)
  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

  
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
CategoryWithAdditiveStructure

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
PreAdditive
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
AdditiveStructure ?PA

    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
PreAdditive
 exact AbelianToPreAdditive.
    
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
AdditiveStructure AbelianToPreAdditive
 
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Zero AbelianToPreAdditive
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
BinDirectSums AbelianToPreAdditive

      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
Zero AbelianToPreAdditive
 exact (to_Zero A).
      
A: AbelianPreCat
hs:= A: has_homsets A
BinDirectSums AbelianToPreAdditive
 exact (BinDirectSums_from_BinProducts
                 AbelianToPreAdditive (to_Zero A) (to_BinProducts A)).
  Defined.

End abelian_is_additive.
